nasb.text: And some men were carrying on a bed a man who was paralyzed; and they were trying to bring him in and to set him down in front of Him.

esv.text: And behold, some men were bringing on a bed a man who was paralyzed, and they were seeking to bring him in and lay him before Jesus,

cnv.text: 有人用床抬著一個癱子，想送進去，放在耶穌跟前。

ccb.text: 有人用担架抬着一个瘫痪的人想进到屋里，把他放在耶稣面前。

csbs.text: 这时候，有几个人用床榻抬来一个瘫痪的人，想把他带进去放在耶稣面前。
